# LLMCosts.dev — Meituan Models Pricing

> Updated: 2026-04-09
> Route cheaper via OpenRouter: https://openrouter.ai/?ref=llmcosts
(Part 1)

| Model | Provider | Input/1M | Output/1M | Cached/1M | Context | ELO | Tier | Type |
|-------|----------|----------|---------|---------|---------|-----|------|------|
| [Meituan: LongCat Flash Chat](https://llmcosts.dev/models/longcat-flash-chat) | Meituan | $0.2 | $0.8 | $None | 131,072 | 1200 | standard | Closed |
